property.name: documentBase64
property.description-key: Base64 content for PDF/image, with or without data URL prefix

property.name: documentMimeType
property.description-key: Mime type such as application/pdf or image/png

property.name: documentFileName
property.description-key: Optional file name used to infer type

property.name: viewerMode
property.description-key: full, load, or document to hide specific button groups

property.name: showBase64Input
property.description-key: Shows or hides base64 text area

property.name: showUploadButton
property.description-key: Show or hide the Upload File button

property.name: showAttachButton
property.description-key: Show or hide the Attach button

property.name: showAnnotateButton
property.description-key: Show or hide the Annotate button

property.name: showClearMarksButton
property.description-key: Show or hide the Clear Marks button

property.name: showDownloadButton
property.description-key: Show or hide the Download button

property.name: showExpandButton
property.description-key: Show or hide the Expand/Collapse button

property.name: showCloseButton
property.description-key: Show or hide the Close button

property.name: documentBase64Output
property.description-key: Current document base64 emitted by the control

property.name: documentViewerActionOutput
property.description-key: Action that triggered output: attach or annotate
